The tool identifier you requested has not appeared in any <retrieve_tools> result for this query.

You MUST:
- First call <retrieve_tools> to retrieve a candidate set of tools.
- Then choose ONE tool_id/name that has appeared in a retrieval result for this query.

In your next assistant response:
1) Retrieve tools again with <retrieve_tools>, if needed.
2) Call one of the tools that has appeared in a retrieval result for this query, using the exact identifier returned there.
